steps.title: Identify the specific information Cummings and Knapp provided
steps.content: The notes show that Cummings and Knapp confirmed their ancestors carried youlk when traveling. This is the concrete, specific detail that explains why consulting them mattered to Lullfitz's research.

steps.title: Find the answer that uses this information
steps.content: Choice D indicates that Cummings and Knapp provided specific information—their ancestors transported the plant—and explains why this mattered to Lullfitz's study (it supported her hypothesis). The other choices either describe them vaguely, misattribute Lullfitz's own findings to them, or focus on who they are rather than what they contributed. That matches choice D — D is correct.
